channel.title: Quality3Ds Daily Pulse
channel.description: Curated daily news for 3D printing enthusiasts.

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #162 - 2026-06-18
item.description:
🔥 As California Debates AB 2047, New York’s Law Targeting 3D Printed Guns Prepares to Take Effect California’s controversial AB 2047 is still making its way through the state legislature. Meanwhile, in New York, lawmakers have already moved forward with similar restrictions for preventing the production of, reported by 3DPrint.com on Jun 17, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/326731/as-california-debates-ab-2047-new-yorks-law-targeting-3d-printed-guns-prepares-to-take-effect

🚨 ELEGOO Launches World's First Emoji Co-Branded 3D Printer - AndroidGuys ELEGOO Launches World's First Emoji Co-Branded 3D Printer AndroidGuys Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on Jun 17, 2026. Read more ? https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimgFBVV95cUxPOWVMeC0xb3BQSG9yNlFpRTJfZ0lrSlBsN1VLU0E3bTdOY1JTN2ttMmotakdHMHp1cThCYTc2RFE2d0dVVmVXdGw2OUFpdURzaGZOVTFNSGktaDhnQWFxd3BVLWlPdHpRZ1BCc0loTkNFZVVUc18yb1Fmc1RSVmtyWHhnLWU4M3hQMTFodjZ2UVlvejdQRzUyTFB3?oc=5

📰 Italian Exhibition Group and AFEMO renew partnership Italian Exhibition Group (IEG) and AFEMO — the Italian Association of Manufacturers and Exporters of Jewelry Machinery — have renewed their strategic partnership for the 2026–2028 period, reinforcing the... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jun 17, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/IEG-AFEMO-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/italian-exhibition-group-and-afemo-renew-partnership

📷 Zellerfeld acquires Volumental, German 3D printed footwear platform gains a database of 66 million scanned feet German platform Zellerfeld, known for its fully 3D printed footwear, has acquired Swedish company Volumental, a specialist in foot scanning and shoe fitting. The deal was announced in June 2026, reported by VoxelMatters on Jun 17, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Zrzut-ekranu-2026-06-17-164707-150x150.png Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/zellerfeld-acquires-volumental-german-3d-printed-footwear-platform-gains-a-database-of-66-million-scanned-feet

🖨 Nano Dimension set to pivot away from additive manufacturing as Infinite Epigenetics merger explored Nano has gradually been divesting many of its additive manufacturing investments, with Desktop Metal, Fabrica, and Markforged, as well as its flagship Additively Manufactured Electronics business, all being sold off... Reported by TCT Magazine on Jun 17, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/06/NNDM_BIG-01b3a703.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/nano-dimension-set-to-pivot-away-from-additive-manufacturing-as-infinite-epigenetics-merger-explored

🚀 Beehive Industries to install 30 EOS M4 ONYX machines in $50m investment in metal 3D printing The fleet of machines will support the production of the company's flagship Frenzy 8 engine line. Reported by TCT Magazine on Jun 17, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/06/Production-Version-of-Beehive-Industries----Frenzy----8-Engine-1.jpg Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/beehive-industries-to-install-30-eos-m4-onyx-machines-in-50m-investment-in-metal-3d-printing

📰 Markforged adds color to Onyx material family with new glass fiber-filled nylon Markforged has released Onyx GF, a chopped glass fiber-filled nylon that extends the company’s Onyx material family by offering functional color as a built-in property rather than a secondary finish. … The post Markforged adds color to Onyx material family with new glass fiber-filled nylon appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Markforged-Onyx-GF-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/markforged-adds-color-to-onyx-material-family-with-new-glass-fiber-filled-nylon

🚀 Hi3D Enhances Its Maker Toolkit, Targeting the Gap Between AI and Printing Hi3D, the browser-based AI model generation platform built on its proprietary Sparc3D engine, has rolled out a suite of new Maker features aimed at one of the most persistent friction points in consumer 3D printing:... The centerpiece of the release…, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jun 17, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/split-to-print-780x470.jpg-150x100.avif Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/hi3d-enhances-its-maker-toolkit-targeting-the-gap-between-ai-and-printing-252390

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #161 - 2026-06-17
item.description:
♻️ Bike-Powered Shredder Makes Short Work of 3D Printer Waste [Brogan M Pratt] and his students do a lot of 3D printing, and as such found themselves producing a lot of plastic waste. Seeing an opportunity, they built a bike-powered …read more, reported by Hackaday 3D Printing on Jun 16, 2026. Image ? https://hackaday.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/I-Built-a-Bike-Powered-Plastic-Shredder-7-31-screenshot.png Read more ? https://hackaday.com/2026/06/16/bike-powered-shredder-makes-short-work-of-3d-printer-waste

🚀 Four additive manufacturing users on their biggest AM truths, learnings and more Real user insights from JLR, Rolls-Royce, Nestlé and GKN Aerospace. Reported by TCT Magazine on Jun 16, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/06/DHR-5346.jpg Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/four-additive-manufacturing-users-on-their-biggest-am-truths-learnings-and-more

📷 Liuzhou Yinrui cuts new model development time by one-third with metrology scanning Liuzhou Yinrui Vehicle Industry Co., Ltd., a stamping parts and assembly supplier to major Chinese automakers, has achieved a reduction in new model development time by at least one-third after … The post Liuzhou... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jun 16, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/SHINING-3D-Liuzhou-Yinrui-Vehicle-Industry-Co-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/liuzhou-yinrui-cuts-new-model-development-time-by-one-third-with-metrology-scanning

💻 New exhibit at Haarlem’s 3D Print Gallery explores sustainability Still within its first year of operation, the 3D Print Gallery in Haarlem is preparing to open its fourth exhibition, “An Ocean of Possibilities for Sustainability”, this July. For this … The post New exhibit at Haarlem’s 3D Print Gallery explores sustainability appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/haarlem-exhibition-1-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/new-exhibit-at-haarlems-3d-print-gallery-explores-sustainability

🏠 Wells Fargo named as preferred home mortgage lender for 3D printed homes constructed by ICON The collaboration between the two firms, they say, expands access to financing for buyers of ICON homes. Reported by TCT Magazine on Jun 16, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/06/WF-Red-and-Yellow-Sign-Outside.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/wells-fargo-named-as-preferred-home-mortgage-lender-for-3d-printed-homes-constructed-by-icon

💻 Markforged introduces Onyx GF chopped glass fibre-filled nylon material Onyx GF is available immediately in red, yellow, blue, green, grey, and white, and will address the requirements of modern visual management systems, per Markforged. Reported by TCT Magazine on Jun 16, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/06/Untitled-design--44--1.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/markforged-introduces-onyx-gf-chopped-glass-fibre-filled-nylon-material

🚀 CosmicMaker space 3D printing business emerges after successful test flights Photocentric has received support from the UK Space Agency via ESA’s BSGN program, and won three grants to manufacture and validate its CosmicMaker 3D printer. Reported by TCT Magazine on Jun 16, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/06/-Silicon-carbide-3D-printed-parts.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/cosmicmaker-space-3d-printing-business-emerges-after-successful-test-flights

🏠 Maldives resort installs 3D printed clay reef structures Anantara Dhigu Maldives Resort has placed 13 flower-shaped reef structures in its surrounding lagoon, produced by reef restoration company rrreefs using 3D printed fired terracotta clay, steel reinforcement, and a …... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jun 16, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Maldives-3D-printed-clay-reef-05-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/maldives-resort-installs-3d-printed-clay-reef-structures

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #160 - 2026-06-16
item.description:
🚨 Bambu Lab Anniversary Sale Includes First-Ever Discounts for P2S, H2S & H2C Machines - All3DP Bambu Lab Anniversary Sale Includes First-Ever Discounts for P2S, H2S & H2C Machines All3DP Reported by Google News - 3D Printing on Jun 15, 2026. 🚀 SSAB launches what it claims is world’s first protection steel powder Swedish steel producer SSAB has taken its Armox 500 AM Powder – the first in a series of planned powder grades – to the Eurosatory Defense and Security tradeshow in … The post SSAB launches what it claims is world’s... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jun 15, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/SSAB-Armox-500-AM-Powder-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/ssab-launches-what-it-claims-is-worlds-first-protection-steel-powder

📰 Forks 3.0, 3D printing the cutlery of the future Picture a place setting, with a fork, spoon, and knife. Chances are, we’re all more or less picturing the same thing, reported by VoxelMatters on Jun 15, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/mishakahn-white-bg-1200x-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/forks-3-0-3d-printing-the-cutlery-of-the-future

🚀 R3 Printing emerges from stealth to launch material extrusion 3D printing technology The company's R3 Printer is available to order now, with shipping of the R3 Printer Ultra set to commence on August 31, 2026. Reported by TCT Magazine on Jun 15, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/06/YFRH935gZ8Bmro5VyozyXNJK4E-1.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/r3-printing-emerges-from-stealth-to-launch-material-extrusion-3d-printing-technology

📰 Aalto University researchers use 3D printed panels to solve 6G coverage issues Researchers at Aalto University have developed a class of passive signal-management devices — called metacrystals — that redirect radio waves around physical obstacles without requiring power, active tuning or... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jun 15, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Aalto-University-6G-panels-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/aalto-university-researchers-use-3d-printed-panels-to-solve-6g-coverage-issues

📰 Former Fremont Mayor Lily Mei joins Velo3D Board of Directors Mei currently serves as Executive Director of Emerging City Leaders Institute for Partnership & Strategic Empowerment ("ECLIPSE") at San Francisco Bay University, a role she has held since June 2025. Reported by TCT Magazine on Jun 15, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/06/image--29--1.png Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/former-fremont-mayor-lily-mei-joins-velo3d-board-of-directors

🖨 Spectrum Filaments receives multi-million Blue Gravity Capital Investment Spectrum Group Sp. z o.o., the Polish manufacturer behind the Spectrum Filaments and The Filament brands, has secured a strategic investment to expand production of FFF/FDM 3D printing materials, reported by 3D Printing Industry on Jun 15, 2026. Image ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/SPC_and_BGC_2-150x100.jpg Read more ? https://3dprintingindustry.com/news/spectrum-filaments-receives-multi-million-blue-gravity-capital-investment-252340

📰 SSAB to expand production facility for additive manufacturing steel powder "We are strengthening our offering in steel powder for additive manufacturing and making the technology more accessible to our customers." Reported by TCT Magazine on Jun 15, 2026. Image ? https://storage.ghost.io/c/f0/da/f0da4f6a-82b1-46cf-ab14-3cc5e6b2d473/content/images/2026/06/SSAB-metal-additive-manufacturing.jpg Read more ? https://www.tctmagazine.com/ssab-to-expand-production-facility-for-additive-manufacturing-steel-powder

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #159 - 2026-06-15
item.description:

♻️ RIT gets $3 million NSF grant to advance metal 3D printing with recycled feedstocks Rochester Institute of Technology has received a nearly $3 million grant from the National Science Foundation (NSF) to develop a new approach to metal additive manufacturing. The research centers on … The post RIT gets $3 million NSF grant to advance metal 3D printing with recycled feedstocks appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/NMSU-grant-150x150.jpeg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/rit-gets-3-million-nsf-grant-to-advance-metal-3d-printing-with-recycled-feedstocks

📰 La Universidad de Nottingham inaugura el centro de CSAM con mayor presión de Reino Unido La Universidad de Nottingham ha inaugurado el centro de fabricación aditiva por pulverización en frío (CSAM) que ostenta el récord de presión de Reino Unido y cuyos sistemas ha diseñado e instalado … The post La... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jun 14, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Nottingham-Uni-coldspray-AM-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/la-universidad-de-nottingham-inaugura-el-centro-de-csam-con-mayor-presion-de-reino-unido

🏠 Australian musician builds 3D printed concertinas and violins from home workshop Australian accordionist Eddy Jay, who has performed on Broadway and toured the UK, lacked woodworking skills and so turned to a 3D printer as an alternative path into lutherie. He … The post Australian musician builds 3D printed concertinas and violins from home workshop appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Australian-instruments-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/australian-musician-builds-3d-printed-concertinas-and-violins-from-home-workshop

🖨 The Rise of IP: The First Emoji 3D Printer Is Here. Don’t Rule Out Star Wars Next. For years, most desktop 3D printers have looked more or less the same. Some are black, reported by 3DPrint.com on Jun 14, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/326035/the-rise-of-ip-the-first-emoji-3d-printer-is-here-dont-rule-out-star-wars-next

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #158 - 2026-06-14
item.description:
🔥 New law aims to ban 3D-printed guns after UnitedHealthcare CEO murder - The Independent New law aims to ban 3D-printed guns after UnitedHealthcare CEO murder The Independent Reported by Google News - 3D Printing Viral on Jun 13, 2026. 🏠 Luyten turns a tower crane into a 3D printer, now capable of printing buildings up to 100 meters tall Australian company Luyten has just unveiled the Ascend Series A27, a concrete 3D printing system mounted on a tower crane. According to the manufacturer, this is the world’s first device … The post Luyten turns a tower crane into a 3D printer, now capable of printing buildings up to 100 meters tall appeared first on VoxelMatters - The... Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Zrzut-ekranu-2026-06-13-153936-150x150.png Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/luyten-turns-a-tower-crane-into-a-3d-printer-now-capable-of-printing-buildings-up-to-100-meters-tall

🚀 US Marine Corps creates fabrication specialist role with 3D printing at its core The US Marine Corps is consolidating two existing engineering roles into a single new military occupational specialty (MOS) centered on additive manufacturing, taking effect October 1, 2026. Metal Worker MOS … The post US Marine Corps creates fabrication specialist role with 3D printing at its core appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive manufacturing. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/Marine-Corps-AM-role-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/us-marine-corps-creates-fabrication-specialist-role-with-3d-printing-at-its-core

🚀 SpaceX IPO Puts a Major 3D Printing Powerhouse on Wall Street SpaceX officially began trading on the Nasdaq today under the ticker symbol SPCX, marking one of the most anticipated and largest public offerings in Wall Street history. The company priced, reported by 3DPrint.com on Jun 12, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/326801/spacex-ipo-puts-a-major-3d-printing-powerhouse-on-wall-street

🖨 The Seminal Moment: Creality’s IPO Analysis & Possible Effects Something super important happened just a few days ago, and too few people paid attention. Creality, a pioneer in low-cost desktop material extrusion printers, went public, reported by 3DPrint.com on Jun 12, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/326431/the-seminal-moment-crealitys-ipo-analysis-possible-effects

🚀 Photocentric Spins Out CosmicMaker to Pursue In-Space Manufacturing UK-based 3D printing company Photocentric has spun out its space manufacturing activities into a separate business called CosmicMaker, after the successful demonstration of its 3D printing technology aboard a series... Reported by 3DPrint.com on Jun 12, 2026. Read more ? https://3dprint.com/326832/photocentric-spins-out-cosmicmaker-to-pursue-in-space-manufacturing

🏠 Control Your Smart Home with a Custom 3D-Printed Macropad As a smart home enthusiast, I rely on smart lighting quite a lot. But when I needed to equip every room in the house with a light controller, sometimes even multiple, I ran into a budget problem, reported by Prusa Blog on Jun 12, 2026. Image ? https://storage.googleapis.com/prusa3d-content-prod-14e8-wordpress-blog-prod/2026/05/0591b6ce-3d-printed_smart_home_controller_blog-698x325.jpg Read more ? https://blog.prusa3d.com/a-cheap-smart-light-controller-thanks-to-3d-printing_136243

item.title: 3D PRINTING PULSE #157 - 2026-06-13
item.description:

Bay Area students used a 3D printer for one that ‘sounds acoustically better’ San Francisco Chronicle, reported by Google News - 3D Printing on Jun 12, 2026. 🖨 Legor to offer MoldJet technology for gold and platinum jewelry 3D printing Legor and Tritone Technologies formed a strategic partnership to expand precious-metal additive manufacturing across fine jewelry, watchmaking, and the luxury sector. Under the agreement, the Bressanvido, Italy-based precious metals group … The post Legor to offer MoldJet technology for gold and platinum jewelry 3D printing appeared first on VoxelMatters - The heart of additive... Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/legor-scopri-il-gruppo-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/legor-to-offer-moldjet-technology-for-gold-and-platinum-jewelry-3d-printing

🚀 US Navy engineers turn to additive manufacturing for obsolete boiler components Engineers at Naval Surface Warfare Center, Philadelphia Division (NSWCPD) have turned to additive manufacturing to replace an obsolete component in the Boiler Combustion Monitoring System (BCMS) — safety-critical... Reported by VoxelMatters on Jun 12, 2026. Image ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/06/NSWCPD-boilers-01-150x150.jpg Read more ? https://www.voxelmatters.com/us-navy-engineers-turn-to-additive-manufacturing-for-obsolete-boiler-components
